title: Crepidium horielense
taxonomy: Crepidium horielense is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the genus Crepidium and the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the order Asparagales, which is a group of flowering plants that also includes asparagus and lilies. Further, Crepidium horielense is often grouped within the subfamily Cranichideae, a subfamily of orchids that are characterized by their slender stems and small, delicate flowers. The combination of these classifications provides a comprehensive understanding of the plant's relationships within the broader plant kingdom.
